_comment_reprovision_manifest: Manifest for the vsock re-attach demo (issue #27, Task 2). The in-VM agent
read a file, deliberately dispose the box mid-task, then — on the rebuilt box
the supervisor re-attaches to over vsock — write the report and finish.
No model is involved, so network is None and the egress allowlist is empty:
the demo proves reprovision + vsock re-attach with zero external dependencies.
filesystem is ReadWrite for the read + report work; exec stays None.

goal.description: Read a file, then (after the box is disposed and rebuilt) write report.md to prove the supervisor re-attached to the fresh guest over vsock.
